_README: Copy to astrometry.local.json (gitignored) OR set the ASTROMETRY_* env vars. Env wins. ALL paths are EXTERNAL to this repo by contract — never point these inside the project tree.
_solveField: Path/command to the external solve-field binary. On a native Linux/WSL install it is usually just 'solve-field' (on PATH).
_wslDistro: If solve-field lives inside a WSL distro, name it here (e.g. 'Ubuntu-24.04'); the wrapper invokes `wsl -d <distro> -e solve-field …` and auto-translates Windows paths (K:\a\b) to /mnt/k/a/b. Leave null for a native binary.
_indexDir: External index directory the owner provisioned on a drive with headroom (e.g. /mnt/e/astrometry_indexes inside WSL, or E:\astrometry_indexes natively). Used by --check-install; solve-field itself reads its own backend .cfg add_path.
_backendConfig: Optional path to a custom astrometry backend .cfg whose `add_path` points at indexDir. A WSL-side path when wslDistro is set. Leave null to use solve-field's default cfg.
